description: Visit the venue or team's official website, find the 'Buy Tickets' or 'Get Tickets' CTA, inspect the destination URL
signals: ticketmaster.com → TM; axs.com → AXS; seatgeek.com → SG; eventim.de → Eventim; dice.fm → DICE; eventbrite.com → EB (no exclusivity)
scalability: Medium — manual for individual venues; automatable with headless browser (Playwright) + URL regex
tixr_application: Primary exclusivity signal for Venue Win Probability (VWP) feature in prediction model

description: Search a venue by name/city using TM API. If venue exists with events, it's a TM client
signals: Presence in TM API = TM exclusive or TM-affiliated. Absence = independent or competitor platform
scalability: High — 5K calls/day free. Can batch all venues in the Tixr venue database
accuracy: High (85%) — not all TM venues appear consistently, and some non-exclusive venues appear too
tixr_application: Cross-reference all Wikidata/OSM venues against TM API to flag TM-locked venues

description: Search venue by name in Songkick. Check event listings for ticket links — Songkick shows which platform sells each event's tickets
signals: Ticket link domain per event = ticketing platform. Multiple platforms across events = non-exclusive
scalability: Medium-High — Songkick API provides venue search
tixr_application: Event cadence + platform diversity score — venues using multiple platforms = lower exclusivity lock

description: Use Google search operators to find if a venue's events appear on a specific ticketing platform
signals: site:ticketmaster.com 'Uber Arena Berlin' → events found = TM affiliated
scalability: Low — rate limited by Google. Useful for spot-checking
accuracy: Medium (70%) — some venues appear on TM resale without being primary TM clients

description: Wikidata has P137 (operator/owner) and P4290 (ticketing system) properties for some venues
signals: P137 = AEG → AXS lock; P137 = Live Nation → TM lock; P4290 directly states ticketing system
scalability: High — batch SPARQL query across all venues
accuracy: Medium (60%) — not all venues have P4290 populated in Wikidata
tixr_application: Enrichment layer for Wikidata venue records already scraped

description: Monitor Google News, SportBusiness, Billboard, Pollstar for [venue] + [ticketing platform] + [partnership]
signals: '[Venue] selects [Platform] as Official Ticketing Partner' = exclusive deal with contract start date
scalability: Medium — automatable with RSS + keyword alerts
accuracy: Very High (95%) when source is official PR
tixr_application: Identify deals expiring (contracts typically 3-5 years). DOJ now caps TM at 4 years — use announcement date + 4yr to flag expiry window
tools: Google News RSS, NewsAPI, Perplexity alerts

description: AXS publicly lists their venue/team partners at axs.com/venues — scrapeable
signals: Venue in AXS list = AXS exclusive or strong AXS partner
scalability: High — single page scrape, update quarterly
tixr_application: Direct exclusivity flag for AXS venues; cross-reference against opportunity markets

description: SeatGeek publicly exposes venue sitemap at seatgeek.com/sitemap/venues
signals: Venue in SeatGeek sitemap = SeatGeek client (primary or secondary). Cross with team official site to confirm if primary
accuracy: Medium (65%) — SeatGeek lists secondary market venues too
tixr_application: Build SeatGeek venue list, cross-ref with TM/AXS — venues NOT on any major platform = open opportunity
tools: requests + HTML parser (already in SeatGeek sitemap[cite:292])

description: DICE exposes its venue list at dice.fm/venues — city-filtered, scrapeable
signals: Venue on DICE = DICE partner (often exclusive for electronic music/club venues). These are prime Tixr adjacency targets
tixr_application: Identify DICE-locked venues (club/boutique) in EMEA/SEA as near-term Tixr competition or acquisition intelligence

description: If a venue/team appears in Viagogo's open distribution partner list, they have NO exclusive primary ticketing deal
signals: Viagogo partnership = open distribution = no exclusivity = Tixr can compete on equal footing
scalability: Medium — Viagogo blog/press releases list partners
accuracy: High (90%) — open distribution is a binary status
tixr_application: Highest-priority outreach targets: venues with open distribution but no premium ticketing experience
tools: Press release monitoring + Viagogo partner blog[cite:286]
